contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact form for team opportunities, technical collaborations or work proposals.

contentSection.heading: How I Collaborate
contentSection.paragraph1: My integration process starts with a technical conversation to understand the architecture, stack, and team goals. I adapt quickly to existing codebases, coding conventions, and established workflows. I value clear communication, constructive feedback, and continuous improvement of both the product and the development process. In my first weeks I focus on understanding the business domain and the architectural decisions already in place. I contribute clean code and incremental improvements from within, without imposing my way of working. My goal is to be productive from day one with minimal friction.
contentSection.paragraph2: I thrive in environments that prioritize software quality, automated testing, and well-reasoned technical decisions. My experience covers full-stack applications with React and Node.js, CLI tools, process automation, and relational database systems. If your team works with TypeScript, continuous integration, and clean architecture, I can contribute from the first sprint. My approach is to write code that another developer can understand without explanation, document important decisions, and leave each module in better shape than I found it. I do not need constant supervision and take ownership of what I build, but I also know when to ask for help when domain complexity demands it.
contentSection.paragraph3: Testing discipline is central to how I work. I write tests first when fixing bugs and tests after for new behaviors, ensuring functionality is tested from the user's perspective. In code review I focus on clarity, edge case coverage, and architectural consistency, providing actionable feedback and receiving critique with openness. I design CI/CD pipelines that run linter, type-checking, and tests in parallel, with automated deployments that include validation and health checks. I handle communication with transparency: daily updates, technical discussions documented in PRs, and architectural decisions recorded for traceability.

hero.label: Open to joining a team
hero.titleAccessible: I want to join a team and build something precise.
hero.description: I'm looking to join a team where I can translate complex requirements into clean, accessible, high-performance interfaces. My profile combines strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js engineering skills with clear communication and product-oriented thinking. Reach out if you want to discuss a role, a technical collaboration, or a concrete opportunity.
